caption: In a formal assembly hall, a large group of men and women are seated in tiered rows of wooden desks. The attendees are dressed in a variety of professional and traditional attire, including light-colored button-down shirts, orange and white kurtas, and white sarees. As the sequence progresses, several individuals are seen shifting in their seats and engaging in conversation. A man in a light blue button-down shirt is prominently visible, gesturing with his arm as if speaking or reacting to a discussion. Nearby, a man in a grey suit is captured speaking while glancing toward others. The background consists of rows of dark wooden benches, and the atmosphere appears focused and deliberative. There are no visible logos or on-screen text in the scene. The composition remains consistent, capturing the group from a medium-wide angle as they interact within the legislative setting.
